## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, outbound efforts, and new product developments.](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content recovery: 380 blog pages are live; clicks are climbing back up](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Outbound: Email infrastructure improved; sending \~200 emails/day, aiming to return to 500+/day](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [New product: Email autopilot automation in beta testing, addressing email overload](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### SEO Recovery and Content Strategy

  - [All 380 blog pages are live and accessible](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Clicks are climbing back up, though exact previous positions may not be achieved](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Domain authority increased by 1 point](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [More referring domains on SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Next content focus: AI NoTakers comparisons (20-30 articles by next week)](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Articles will compare two products and mention Knapsack for security/privacy](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Outbound Email Campaigns

  - [Significant improvements in email infrastructure to address deliverability issues](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Diverse email providers used: Namecheap, Smartly, Zapmail, Outlook, Gmail](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Reduced daily email volume temporarily (from 450-500 to \~200) to improve deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Introduced SpinTax for email variation](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Removed calendar links from emails](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Aiming to return to 500+ emails/day within a week](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Backlinking Efforts

  - [Some responses received, but mostly asking for $300-$600 per backlink](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Focusing on free backlink opportunities first](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Jimmy to leverage GrowthX's client network for potential backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Domain Authority and Traffic

  - [Current domain authority in mid-20s to mid-30s, considered good](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Traffic numbers can vary; strategy depends on content focus and competitiveness](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### New Product Development: Email Autopilot

  - [Developed in response to podcast host's request for private AI email management](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Beta testing with trusted testers](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Features include email categorization, summarization, and suggested responses](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Differentiator: Processes emails privately, without trusting third parties](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue monitoring SEO recovery and content performance](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Publish 20-30 AI NoTakers comparison articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Ramp up email outbound efforts to previous levels (500+ emails/day)](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Jimmy to facilitate free backlinks through GrowthX client network](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Mark and Jimmy to test the new Email Autopilot feature](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Consider creating more content about using AI for email management](https://fathom.video/share/fX8QNCts-Nc83fzqtz1Qgumw8d8JFPCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
